Apple_Apple_scab.description: Fungal disease causing olive-green to black scabby lesions on apple leaves and fruits.
Apple_Apple_scab.causes: Fungal infection favored by cool and wet conditions (Venturia inaequalis).
Apple_Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides: mancozeb, captan, or myclobutanil.
Apple_Apple_scab.prevention: Remove infected leaves, proper pruning for air circulation.

Apple_Black_rot.description: Serious fungal disease affecting leaves, branches, and fruits.
symptoms: Purple leaf spots with black centers
Apple_Black_rot.causes: Fungal spores (Diplodia seriata) surviving in plant debris.
Apple_Black_rot.treatment: Prune infected branches, apply captan or mancozeb fungicides.
Apple_Black_rot.prevention: Orchard sanitation, crop rotation, resistant varieties.

Apple_Cedar_apple_rust.description: Rust disease causing bright orange spots on apple leaves.
Apple_Cedar_apple_rust.causes: Gymnosporangium juniperi-virginianae fungus requiring cedar trees.
Apple_Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Protective fungicides: myclobutanil early in season.
Apple_Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Remove nearby cedar trees/junipers if possible.

Apple_healthy.description: Healthy apple plant with normal leaf color and growth.
Apple_healthy.recommendation: Maintain proper irrigation, balanced fertilization, regular pruning.

Blueberry_healthy.description: Healthy blueberry plant with vigorous growth.

Cherry_(including_sour)_Powdery_mildew.description: Powdery mildew forming white powdery growth on cherry leaves.
Cherry_(including_sour)_Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation, avoid overhead watering.

Cherry_(including_sour)_healthy.description: Healthy cherry plant with uniform green leaves.
Cherry_(including_sour)_healthy.recommendation: Good drainage, full sunlight, proper pruning.

Corn_(maize)_Cercospora_leaf_spot_Gray_l.description: Fungal leaf spots causing gray elongated lesions.
Corn_(maize)_Cercospora_leaf_spot_Gray_l.prevention: Crop rotation, resistant varieties, timely planting.

Corn_(maize)_Common_rust.description: Rust disease with reddish-brown pustules on leaves.
symptoms: Rust-colored pustules on upper/lower leaf surfaces
Corn_(maize)_Common_rust.prevention: Plant resistant hybrids, destroy crop residue.

Corn_(maize)_Northern_Leaf_Blight.description: Severe leaf blight with long gray-green lesions.
Corn_(maize)_Northern_Leaf_Blight.causes: Exserohilum turcicum favored by cool, humid weather.
Corn_(maize)_Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Crop rotation, residue management, resistant hybrids.

Corn_(maize)_healthy.description: Healthy corn plant with strong green leaves.

Grape_Black_rot.description: Black rot causing brown leaf spots and fruit mummification.
symptoms: Circular brown spots with black centers
Grape_Black_rot.causes: Guignardia bidwellii spores overwinter in debris.
Grape_Black_rot.treatment: Mancozeb or myclobutanil during early growth.

Grape_Esca_(Black_Measles).description: Serious trunk disease causing leaf discoloration.
Grape_Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: No effective cure; trunk surgery sometimes helps.
Grape_Esca_(Black_Measles).prevention: Clean pruning tools, avoid trunk wounds.

Grape_healthy.description: Healthy grape plant with vigorous growth.

Orange_Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description: Devastating bacterial disease causing yellow shoots.
Orange_Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).causes: Candidatus Liberibacter bacteria spread by psyllids.
Orange_Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Psyllid vector control, certified nursery stock.

Peach_Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial disease affecting peach leaves and fruits.
Peach_Bacterial_spot.causes: Xanthomonas arboricola pv. pruni spread by rain.

Peach_healthy.description: Healthy peach plant with vibrant foliage.

Pepper_bell_Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial leaf spot with water-soaked lesions.
Pepper_bell_Bacterial_spot.causes: Xanthomonas spp. spread by rain, tools.

Pepper_bell_healthy.description: Healthy bell pepper with glossy green leaves.

Potato_Early_blight.description: Fungal disease with concentric ring lesions.
Potato_Early_blight.causes: Alternaria solani in warm, humid conditions.

Potato_Late_blight.description: Highly destructive foliar and tuber blight.
Potato_Late_blight.causes: Phytophthora infestans in cool, wet weather.

Potato_healthy.description: Healthy potato plant with good foliage.

Squash_Powdery_mildew.description: White powdery fungal growth on squash leaves.
Squash_Powdery_mildew.causes: Podosphaera xanthii in dry days, humid nights.

Strawberry_Leaf_scorch.description: Fungal disease causing leaf margin necrosis.

Tomato_Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial disease causing leaf and fruit lesions.
Tomato_Bacterial_spot.causes: Xanthomonas spp. spread by rain splash.

Tomato_Early_blight.description: Fungal disease with concentric ring lesions.
symptoms: Brown leaf spots with concentric rings
Tomato_Early_blight.causes: Alternaria solani in warm, humid conditions.
Tomato_Early_blight.prevention: Mulch, remove lower leaves, crop rotation.

Tomato_Late_blight.description: Devastating disease causing rapid plant decay.
Tomato_Late_blight.causes: Phytophthora infestans in cool, wet weather.

Tomato_Leaf_Mold.description: Fungal disease thriving in humid greenhouses.
Tomato_Leaf_Mold.causes: Passalora fulva poor ventilation, high humidity.

Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.description: Common foliar disease with small circular spots.
symptoms: Small gray spots with dark borders
Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.causes: Septoria lycopersici in warm, wet conditions.

Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.description: Tiny arachnids sucking sap from leaf undersides.
Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.causes: Tetranychus urticae in hot, dry conditions.

Tomato_Target_Spot.description: Fungal disease creating target-like leaf spots.
Tomato_Target_Spot.causes: Corynespora cassiicola in warm, humid conditions.

Tomato_Tomato_mosaic_virus.description: Viral disease causing mosaic leaf patterns.
Tomato_Tomato_mosaic_virus.causes: Tobacco mosaic virus spread by contact/tools.
Tomato_Tomato_mosaic_virus.treatment: No chemical cure; remove infected plants.
Tomato_Tomato_mosaic_virus.prevention: Disinfect tools, control tobacco products nearby.

Tomato_Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.description: Devastating virus causing upward leaf curl.
Tomato_Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.prevention: Whitefly control with imidacloprid, reflective mulch.

Tomato_healthy.description: Healthy tomato plant with vigorous growth.
